threadTitle: Things that instantly reveal you just moved here
body: You still call it 'Stoke Newington' instead of just 'Stokey'—locals can spot a newbie a mile away.
Caught a night bus from Brixton and overheard a couple debating if they'd rather get lost in the Southbank Centre or the Thames' murky waters. You really can't make this up!

threadTitle: When you knew you were actually living here
body: The smell of fresh kebabs and the sound of spontaneous rooftop parties remind me it's never just another night in Neukölln.

threadTitle: Things Berlin does that nowhere else does
body: Only in Berlin can you find a spontaneous rave in an abandoned warehouse with a makeshift bar serving homemade drinks. It's a vibe.

threadTitle: Real signs someone is from here vs just working here
body: You know someone’s local when they know to avoid 16th and Mission on a Friday night—too many out-of-towners and not enough tacos.

threadTitle: Muni moments that define this city
body: Caught a glimpse of a dog sunbathing on the Civic Center tracks today, while Muni just sat there. Classic SF moment—traffic stopped for a pup!

threadTitle: Things tourists get wrong about living here
body: Tourists think Gràcia is just about Gaudí, but the real charm is in the tiny plazas where locals sip coffee and gossip about the latest neighborhood dramas.

threadTitle: How to spot a recent arrival
body: They’re the ones overly excited about the vermut bars and asking locals where to find 'authentic' paella.

threadTitle: Things that instantly reveal you just moved here
body: You still look puzzled when the bus driver calls out stops like it's a secret code - we all know it’s part of the charm, right?
Caught the N133 last night; a guy sang the entire 'Bohemian Rhapsody' solo while the driver just nodded along. Classic Brixton chaos.

threadTitle: When you knew you were actually living here
body: I realized I was home when I saw an old lady haggling with a street artist over the price of a portrait in front of the old community center.

threadTitle: Things Berlin does that nowhere else does
body: You can catch a tram while sipping a beer from the kiosk—only in Berlin do the public transport and Späti life collide so seamlessly.

threadTitle: Real signs someone is from here vs just working here
body: Only a local would know the exact time the taco truck lines peak after 10 PM on a Friday—it's like clockwork.

threadTitle: Muni moments that define this city
body: Caught the 6 this morning, and a busker belted out 'I Will Survive' as the driver played air drums. Only in SF do delays come with a live soundtrack.

threadTitle: Things tourists get wrong about living here
body: Tourists think they can find a good paella in Gràcia. It's all about the tapas here, and they'll miss the best spots if they chase the rice.

threadTitle: How to spot a recent arrival
body: You can always spot them by the way they pronounce 'C/ Verdi' as 'Calle Verde' instead of just saying 'Verdi'.
